story.description: A clip of nocturnal animals: photographer in action capturing wildlife outdoors
story.hook: Nocturnal shows the first clue in seconds.
story.lead: Bats bolt in half a second when a camera clicks. Their sonar paints the air so they see every obstacle instantly that's why they're already gone. Look close: every wingbeat tilts sideways, not up. Did you learn they're blind?
story.script: Bats bolt in half a second when a camera clicks. Their sonar paints the air so they see every obstacle instantly that's why they're already gone. Look close: every wingbeat tilts sideways, not up. Did you learn they're blind?
story.seo_title: Bats use first move before they change

story.description: A clip of farm animals: tranquil ducks swimming in calm lake
story.hook: Ducks reveal the waterproof feathers first.
story.lead: Ducks reveal the waterproof feathers first. Watch closely, because ducks spread oil from a gland near the tail. That coating helps water bead away, keeping the body warmer and lighter. The pond looks easy because the feather coat is engineered. Would you test it?
story.script: Ducks reveal the waterproof feathers first. Watch closely, because ducks spread oil from a gland near the tail. That coating helps water bead away, keeping the body warmer and lighter. The pond looks easy because the feather coat is engineered. Would you test it?
story.seo_title: Ducks carry waterproof oil on their feathers
story.source_title: tranquil ducks swimming in calm lake
story.title: Ducks carry waterproof oil on their feathers
